label: The Caliper Crypt
description: The Caliper Crypt serves as a licensed workshop set into a reclaimed ruin-cellar beneath Varric Holdfast’s newer brickwork, its walls a patchwork of salvaged ashlar and soot-dark mortar. High benches and pegged tool boards surround a central measuring table scored with grids, while ironbound cabinets secure stamped gauges, seals, and calibrated weights under civic ordinance. Its air carries the mixed tang of lamp oil, metal filings, and curing pitch, and hazard placards from the breach-sites are nailed beside work orders to formalize interdicted materials. A narrow lightwell admits a hard strip of daylight that emphasizes the workshop’s emphasis on exactness, custody, and recorded compliance.
